## What does this change?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New chip in `chips.yaml`
- [ ] Data correction (status / EOL date / specs)
- [ ] New data source / fetcher (`scripts/fetch_*.py`)
- [ ] UI / layout change

## Verification

<!-- How did you test? Locally? Specific page? -->

- [ ] Tested locally (`python3 -m http.server`)
- [ ] No new console errors on a hard refresh
- [ ] If a fetcher was changed: ran it locally and it produced sane output
- [ ] If data was added/corrected: cited a source in `chips.yaml` or the commit message
